name: Elderly Healthcare Assistance Platform
description: A web platform that connects elderly people with nursing services, healthcare support, and emergency assistance. It provides appointment booking, caregiver tracking, and health monitoring.

name: Task Management App
description: A productivity web app where users can create, update, and track daily tasks with authentication and real-time updates.

name: E-Commerce Store
description: A full-stack e-commerce application with product browsing, cart functionality, user authentication, and order management.

name: Weather Dashboard
description: A weather dashboard that fetches real-time weather data using API and displays forecasts for different cities.

name: Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and contact information with modern UI and animations.
